name: pgvector-optimization
description: pgvector performance optimization: HNSW vs IVFFlat index selection and tuning, ef_search / m / ef_construction parameters, iterative scanning for filtered queries, scalar and binary quantization for memory reduction, and dimensionality compression. Embedding-model-agnostic — applies to any float32 vector workload. Use when vector search queries are slow, recall is poor, or index memory footprint is too large.
